meaning: conj.(处方用语)在那里,无论在哪里 无论何时
examples: One way is to drive data for insurance (UBI);
Today, UBI group employs around 400 experienced staff.
UBI have cooperations with Indonesia, Malaysia, South Korea, China and etc.
